reviews.review_description: The original teasers for this game were amazing. Good sounding voice acting, good looking physics, and fun combat. In reality it's just an ok game. Physics suck, levels after 2 are bland as can be, combat is janky, story sucks (including va's), and just overall it's mid. I was really looking forward to this game's release, and it just was eh. Don't get it full price, on a sale it MIGHT be worth it if you just want a mindless action game.

This game parkour systems and gun fights are honestly really fun but after you do the story the only thing you can do is replay the missions i would love for there to be an infinite arena mode where you fight an unlimited waves of enemies at a time just to have fun add replay value but currently this game doesn't have replay value other than the missions please add an arena mode 🙏

game isn’t bad with the combat and stuff but why make a sequel and not add multiplayer ? the first game was some of the best stuff i could play now multiplayer’s servers are down for that i bought this game around 2 yrs ago and it still hasn’t changed if you add multiplayer then this game will be far better than the first one
A good game but please add two things 1 add bone breaking 2 add sandbox.
Game is fire ￼

reviews.review_title: The High anticipated game STRIDE Fates
reviews.review_description: The High anticipated game throughtout the entire stride franchise￼ STRIDE Fates is here but there are problems. The gameplay is smooth and all but sometimes its real buggy the missions dont feel real and the voice acting is not good. This game c ant even be played on pc anymore less you pirate your whole headset. puzzles are cool probably the best part. but man was i exited for this game only for it to be a bare minimum of what the developers would say it was. Still probably the best parkour game on vr so far graphics are good. wouldn’t recommend

I thought I would have fun playing this but everything is repetitive, the missions are repetitive, the gameplay is repetitive, the line delivery is bad and repetitive, even the gunplay. The trailer acts like the combat system is advanced it is not, all it is is slamming a thugs head into a wall for 30 seconds trying to finish a fight. I cannot get a refund on this game because the game acted good for 2 hours. DO NOT GET THIS GAME

Basically this is the whole problem with the game is the mission design. You’re always doing something so it is impossible to follow what the dialogue is saying. Then the missions just aren’t fun especially when you get to the “boss fights” super long and boring like even on rookie mode still extremely long missions of just respawning enemies. (respawning enemies is bad mission design) The game is a chore to play rather than just being fun. Mixed reality mode is cool but still no real objective. Can’t let go of the false advertisement of a full body character but it’s just arms which would be find if you didn’t promote full body. I wish I liked this game but there is really nothing about it to like except the parkour which weirdly isn’t as good as the original game. 4/10

reviews.review_title: Do not buy this buggy half baked mess
reviews.review_description: Such a disappointment of a sequel. I wanted to enjoy this game but I can't even progress past a certain mission because it's bugged. There aren't many other game modes either like the first game, just repetitive missions and some half baked "free roam" levels. Save your money.

I hopped into the game just to have some fun (mind you i alr finish the game)  just to look at my gun and Realize that all my attachments are gone i thought it was just some glitch so i return back to the menu just to put my skins and my attachments back on just to see that i only have a pistol no smg no shotgun.and only to that I had to restart on all of my missions.  


this is very lame for a cool game like this 
do better 👎👎
Very good mix of parkour and action very entertaining and cool to do tricks and stuff u should get it

reviews.review_title: All the 5 stars are fake don't listen to
reviews.review_description: The overall game suck bad parkour grip control eg. Climbing  and combat make not to buy this trust me here also the movement always makes go left for some reason and randomly damages u in game play the trailer is nothing like the game don't make this mistake
When you get to the wing part you can't even fly making it impossible
There are no different endings I can’t save Derek I was looking forward to being able to save him but I can’t :(

reviews.review_title: I feel like it was supposed to be better
reviews.review_description: I watched the old trailer for this game and it looked so good, the music was great and the atmosphere was a more grey and cool, then the game came out and the atmosphere is more warm, the music wasn’t as good, missions felt rushed and the helicopter chase scene from the old trailer was replaced with some boring drones

This game is the most fun vr game I have ever played, and I have played 70+ oculus games, as well as many ps vr games and pc vr games. I got this game on day one and there was a bug that caused me to lose my save file, but I wrote a review about it and the devs fixed it in less than a day. Thank you joyway (:

I love parkour
It is slightly bias
It just sucks. you think it would be a good game, but you end up playing level by level and that's it, plus some of the parkour sucks compared to other games.

This game has a great VR gimmick; parkour. It works pretty well too. The shooting also feels good. The graphics are serviceable, but most VR games have this issue. The voice acting and story are B movie terrible, so at least it's unintentionally funny. The game starts a little bumpy, nothing obvious, but something feels off. Then by the 3rd or 4th level you realize that the game is climb, then shoot, then climb, then shoot. They are very separated. You never really use movement to get away, or as part of combat. I feel like fewer more linear levels would have made this more thrilling, but it feels like 2 games mushed together. I just think of how much could have been gained from a good drop kick and enemies that parkour chase you.
One of my all time favorite Quest games. Alot of playtime, looks great. Wish they'd make another or add on to this.

This vr game is actually amazing. It has an amazing sound track, story and gameplay. And before you write a review saying “the juggernaut boss is to hard” all you have to do is shoot him in the head like 5 times.
SO SO SO SO GOOOOOOOOOOOD

Only get this game if you want to get mad because the game doesn’t work half the time, the grapple is broken, and have an annoying girl scream I. Your ear half the game and have missions that barely work and won’t get an update because the devs are just done with the game, wast of $30 just get the first one, it’s cheaper anyways
I'm stuck at mission, as I reach one of the checkpoints, l automatically die from fall. Probably the building floor doesn't have collision detection.

to many bugs


m

It's a good game but can yall add where you can see your legs please and also I barely played it and I need to. My another game but it won't let me return a d I played for like 40 to 50 mins if you see this please ad better gore

Installed the game again to give it another try after being annoyed of the floaty and uncontrollable parkour, that makes you for example do a wall run when you didn't even want to initiate it, or now suddenly the chaser Jumpstyle by swinging your arms up suddenly not working anymore. This dev obviously doesn't care about how unpolished his games are.

reviews.review_title: ...feels like early access game and bugs
reviews.review_description:
So i loved the the original stride...and when the fates was released i thought it be good....no... sadly no...ai art and voice (if not then horrible acting) 
Story? Short and boring and predictable...not bad in good way
Levels? They ok...even if they feel same
Mechanics? Horrible hands clipping and the enemies are brain dead 
Bugs? Plenty...one that ruined my gameplay is the guardian disappeared (which i guess because of mr mode glasses in helicopter which always working and you cannot turn off)
Music? Actually not bad
Visual? ... Ok...i liked the style
And to add more salt they dev abounded it...so i won't recommend this or other games they made .. sadly but they done in my opinion so don't bother buying
this is amazing for a broke game but i cant get past level 4 so can you pls Make it easier

reviews.review_title: This game is not worth the money I paid
reviews.review_description:
I WOULD LIKE A FULL REFUND FOR THIS BROKEN GAME. 
1. THE RELOAD SYSTEM IS COMPLETELY BUGGED. EVERY TIME I TRY AND GRAB A MAG, IT JUST DOESN’T WORK. I CAN SHOOT ENEMY GUNS FINE BUT I HAVE FULL AMMO OF MY OWN GUN AND CANT RELOAD SIMPLE BECAUSE OF A BUG IN THE GAME. 

2. This bug has been going on for a while and you think the Devs would have fixed it but it seems they don’t care. 

3. The fight system is glitched and bugged also 

I love my meta quest 3 and literally every game i have is just fine. Except this
Not being to crouch kinda sucks. Reloading is questionable and the va is god awful. There are free to plays that are leagues better

I’ve played this game a lot and for the most part really like it. Until. I recently have gotten to a level on the slum jungle dlc and either the developers got lazy and stopped or there’s a massive bug, either way once you get to the implant virus level you can’t get any farther. It’s a shame really.

I hereby state that I hate everyone in the meta quest app. All of them are children who shouldn’t even play vr games. Get a freaking life and enjoy a game for the gameplay for once. Don’t get games because they “look good” get games because they work good like this one. Good job devs! That being said I would like an update for character skins and some more gun skins
The parkour is boring , the combat has no impact, I have arms but no legs cant flip janky cant even get a refund don't buy this game its an unfinished mess
This game is broken as hell Quest wont refund nothing

Like others have said the combat is eek, I wish the devs would have looked at games like resist to see how it's done.
It's really janky, I've never had an issue climbing in games before! Hands get stuck under stuff instead of grabbing it.
I'm only playing it because it's currently free on horizon plus tbh.

reviews.review_title: A lot of jank, and progression bugs
reviews.review_description: Game has potential even with the jankyness, but progression bugs are my biggest issue with any game. If I have to stop playing and research bugs just to find out I wasted the last 30 minutes trying to do something that was never going to happen it really ruins the experience. Level 6, the dialogue that is supposed to happen just stops and then you fall into the abyss at the end of the level and just stay there, game never progresses
i havent played in a while but this game is very fun

reviews.review_title: I hope thatI hope that Bug burns in hell
reviews.review_description: It keeps making me stop walking keeps making me not do my missions and it won’t even let me walk sometimes ￼
If you want a game with guns melee combat and fist fights this game yes stride fates(and stride) is for you it is a remarkable game, shout out to the devs. (can you please add bone breaking?)

reviews.review_title: Very fun lovely game the action is crazy
reviews.review_description: This is a great game they need more shooters like this action crazy baby yeah this is what keeps me on vr thanks n much luv 🔥🔥🔥
It's horribly made, grabs things i don't want, doesn't tell you what you need to do exactly in every mission, wallrunning unrealistic, shotgun spread cartoony asf.. and is completely overpriced..

jeez, so when I bought the game I’ve never liked it but I found out that yku could refund it but my hours played was 2 hours and 14 seconds, and I can assure you that this game is pretty bad. graphics meh, combat laggy and unrealistic, and traversal is horrible the two stars is for how good the trailer looked

So many game breaking bugs, hands snapping to weird geometry, physics issues... Close combat is almost impossible even though encouraged and super clunky, checkpoint bugs everywhere. I have not had a single play session that ended on a good note, always ends with me falling off the edge due to my grapple not coming out, being bumped off the edge, or something else stupid, having the game set my checkpoint to mid air as I'm falling killing me over and over when I reset and forcing me to restart completely. I legit feel like this game is almost a scam. The first one was so good just running around the map flowing over buildings, but this one they decide to keep interrupting everything with pointless puzzles. This game is about parkour not playing tetris to pad your game retention rate.

Skip this and just play the first. I'm going to eventually beat this game  to get my money's worth but I'm def not happy about it. I'm so mad that I actually left a review. If this game wasn't such a mess it would actually be fun

When playing the giant slums map, there are multiple occurrences of weird glitches within it. The dialogue itself can also be broken at times. Stuff in your hand can also just fall out without warning.

The game is also a bit short for what it is. I completed the main levels within a couple of days, and got most of the gun upgrades.

And another thing, it is EXTREMELY repetitive. You are CONSTANTLY having to pull the phone out to solve the same 2 puzzles because for some reason, waving your phone around a terminal and connecting blocks is "fun"

Honestly, just please work more on the game. I don't want it to be a waste.

I love the game and everything about it but the  one thing that kills me is the grappling it alll ways seems I’m to far it’s quite infuriating if you could add like a setting to increase the distance grapples connect that would be awesome or don’t I’m not your dad

reviews.review_title: Annoying stressfully and full of bugs
reviews.review_description: Mission are to ok but to long ,bad checkpoints ,the parkour engine is trash u get glitches,bad grabbing and u fall , jumps are ridiculously wall run și broken,as combat , Scopes are to small and hard to shoot the manual reload is glitching and is hard to take the mag ,the easy reload is just make the game to unreal and biggest problem,if u want to copy mirror edge catalyst,make it right show player's the path,not everyone knows where to go or what to do ,I wish I could make a refund but it's to late ,if u want to ruin your day play this game ,do not buy it ,it's a waste of money on a bad graphic game,and forgot characters shows now emotion, mouth is not even moving it's just a 3D person photo ,and for that money it's not worth it ,I don't recommend this game to anyone .

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME but it needs one thing
reviews.review_description: I love it missions are fun and everything but if it just had like a parkour mode where you can just explore the city or like online mode it would be perfect

I'm so glad I didn't give up on this one. I tried and died ALOT for the first 15 mins and got very frustrated. Then, I just started to get it. I learnt the right way to parkour and explore this amazing city. Exploring this city is incredible. So much fun. The missions are fun and sometimes a bit silly but you get into it. The game has its flaws, but once you work through them you should realize what an amazing creation this is. Sometimes I need to jump into the game and have some crazy gun slinging city swinging fun. There's nothing quite like it. Then I discovered the wing suit and felt almost like I was a young  Bruce Wayne, learning the ropes in a foreign city. Try the demo! Give this game a chance.
purchased this game months ago.......love it but dont fullyunderstand it......yet. will keep trying. pls specify the missions

This game has loads of missions to play through and updates frequently. I love the mixed reality mode that makes this game worth the price. It is very replay able because all the missions are unique. Go buy this game now if you are a fan of jumping across buildings and shooting through waves of enemies! 

GO BUY IT NOWWW!!

reviews.review_title: I want to love this game.
reviews.review_description: The premise is great, the parkor can be fun, but every session ends in rage quitting because I died to a bug. So many bugs I can't keep track. Pretty much the only positive about this game is thicc juicy liza.

I got stuck on the second level, had to get a tutorial, and the game just seems boring and repetitive and the graphics are kind of “eh”. This just doesn’t seem like the right kind of game for me, like I thought it would be more free roam but better and some new objectives but this game is entirely different from STRIDE, no free roam, no game mode where you have to run and get the highest score, the mission after the second one is so long that I got bored while playing and got off of VR because my legs hurt, all the cool stuff in the trailer of the game might be there, but you get it later. I also feel like the devs may have been lazy because some of the character art looks so generated and the grabbing part of the game is kind of bad, I’ll be trying to grab ammo and it grabs the ledge instead.
this game has all the things i like the gore the parkour and the story is fun only problem is that i wish we had more levels then just 13 for the story mode but all in all its a fun game 10/10

reviews.review_title: My favorite game of all time
reviews.review_description: I've only had this game for like 12 hours and I enjoy it so much the gun mechanics are good and the first stride was ok but this one it was absolutely amazing it felt so real it felt like I was there in real time jumping from the buildings felt good the grappling mechanics The Recoil mechanics I think it would have been better to integrate to where you had to physically reload the gun but it makes it easier if you're in a high Action Battle fighting people to just point down at the ground to reload it and I like it in this game what separates most of the games that I have is when I shoot or stab someone their blood actually goes on the ground and it feels so real love this game with the Developers

this game is somewhat fun at first, but really quickly, the missions gets extremely repetitive, difficult to control, and is overall pretty buggy and messy. voice lines sounds like they were made by AI, and has generally poor writing anyway. (this is personal preference) I also dislike that there is no freeroam, or anything similar, but that is just me being greedy. in my opinion, its a waste of your money.

reviews.review_title: Worth it if it's on sale
reviews.review_description: The game can be janky sometimes, and the voice lines sound like they were made by AI. But overall, the idea was great. It felt like I was playing cyberpunk. But it lacks content, and the bugs made me a bit frustrated. The gun handling was eh, the parkour could be worked on. If the game would be more polished, then it would be one of my favorite games. 4/5

Basically mirrors edge in vr

Parkour and gun physics are really good

Melee is decent

First of all, this game is amazing!! Thank you to the developers of this game for letting me experience such a sight. People complaining about the games inability to give them what they want are just people who are expecting something unrealistic and just aren’t good (no offense to them)

I haven’t finished the game yet, and even there there’s only 13 missions and I’m on the 6th I’m glad they aren’t easy, and take time to complete. Not to mention the voices are great and the story feels sightful.

All I have to ask for is that you add more
Missions, more to the story, it would suck completing the game and then just having to go on and play something else. I see the potential of more to the story, and maybe interactions that are about the personal life as well, please keep it up, thank you, devs

reviews.review_title: Paving the way for what VR should be.
reviews.review_description: This game is a master piece. I’ll get it out of the way, the story is a little shaky, but the gameplay is amazing. This game has received countless updates and amazing new levels and features since its release reales in November. There is so much fun to be had in this lengthy amazing game. We have had some pretty short VR games but I clocked in at around 8 hours. I keep replaying certain missions because of how fun they are and I can’t wait for a second or more dlc levels!
Can the devs please add haptics, the reason I got the game is because the other stride has it and I thought this did.

reviews.review_title: Good, but janky the further you progress
reviews.review_description:
After lying to consumers about the campaign in Stride and selling this again, I was pleasantly surprised at first with how good the game was in general.
But the further you progress, the more the issues of this game start to annoy you because they make the game unneccessarily hard.
A lot of jank is not too bad, but crouching through vents and under hospital beds is so janky that you clip through the ground, or your hands disappear into the ground so you can not interact with anything anymore. 
While the jank was funny when you had the freedom of choice, the devs decided that it was a good idea to have parts where you are forced to only rely on mechanics that don't work properly.
So I decided to not finish this game, and will probably never look back.

Tl;dr: Try it on a discount!

How I want to enjoy this more. I want to forgive this game for being rough around the edges. But it's not rough. It's a mess. A glitchy, infuriating mess.  The core of what they have is so fun, but that core is being protected by a thick layer of crap that is hardly worth fighting against. 

Whatever fun you see in the trailers is real, and can be found in game. So give it a go. But good luck.
This game is great, don’t get me wrong, but it’s weird how this game went from teen to mature. To my knowledge, the game hasn’t changed so this is very strange.

The parkour is pretty dope but honestly underutilized in favor of the poor combat. The gunplay sucks and the fact they make you shoot more than doing the parkour (which is actually done quite well) is truly disappointing.

all right, the game is fun I can admit that the story is perfect. All of the moments the epic fights but there’s one thing that’s missing the fact that it’s $30 and when you’re finished with the story there’s nothing you can do I was expecting at the end of the story mode, there would be maps. You can play in areas such as the neon district or you could play in the slums with all the weapons you have previously had but no, that is not true it’s not fair to the fact that you can only do a story mode and there’s nothing to do when you finish like in the original stride you could play in an arena and hack drones, or kill enemies that was fun but now there’s only a story the story is fun if you want the game I highly recommend it if you’re looking for storage or mirrors edge in VR but it’s just nothing to do afterwards it’s just an in uninstall and you’re good there’s nothing there’s no point to play if you finish the story so please I ask add some type of map you can play in like USB drives that have high resolution quality maps that are very very wide for fun gameplay like cranes and stuff and inter able  build buildings with glass that would be fun and the story was small for $30 game ￼

This game is definitely a blast with a good amount of difficulty, parkour, and combat inside. I love swinging from the rooftops and being able to imagine your own combat with the way the ragdolls react. My only complaints about this game are the hook sometimes grabbing the wrong object when another is close by or not grabbing anything at all, the voices kinda sound like an anime, and the ledges being a little glitchy. Those are very minor inconveniences so I still rate five stars!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate you pointing out key aspects of the game—it inspires us to keep improving and moving forward!

reviews.review_description: You will have so much you get to fight and shoot bad  guy you will feel like a ￼HERO you get to hack it just so fun to play
Why doesn't this game have bHaptics support like the first game?

Why? Because then you wouldn't be eligible for a refund. Apart from its constant glitches, terrible gameplay, and awful voice lines and campaign, this game is overall a half-baked piece of garbage. I wouldn't be surprised if it was a money laundering scam. One of the worst glitches is that halfway into the story, every time you die, it anchors you in place, restricting you from using slo-mo, crouching, or even the menu. Once you exit and reload, it takes you back to where you were about an hour ago due to the games terrible checkpoint system. This game will leave you crying on the floor, headset in hand, thinking, "Why did I waste 20 dollars?" Play literally anything else than this game for your own sanity.

Try to is a game I got immediately on release as someone who highly enjoyed stride one I felt that the game was missing a lot of things such as good combat, good environment, and different ways of playstyle after finishing twice, I can say that this game hit every single one of those points the gun plays great. The parkour is amazing. The environments are just amazing and great to look at the game has so many different mechanics that keep it fresh. It is drones and puzzles alongside fully physical combat which adds to people really don’t talk about this game enough and I feel like they should a lot of people critique this game for its horrible voice acting in story which I kind of agree the story and voice acting is pretty bad but honestly that’s not why I bought the game. I bought the game for a great parkour physics game and this game really hit all those notes if you have a spare $40 laying around I would recommend this game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad you highlighted many aspects of the game—it motivates us to keep working hard and striving to get even better!

reviews.review_description: My favorite part about this game is probably that everything is interactive…EVERYTHING…the voice acting can get choppy, but the game makes it up in the thrilling combat of running on walls while blowing a Scull’s brains out. Much more is in the combat but the parkour is amazing I’m still in one of the starting levels so the free-run is limited to climbing mostly. Not much more to say for this game. Hope it gets more updates!

reviews.review_title: After three years it did not disappoint!
reviews.review_description:
This game is amazing, the fun customization and physics, and the parkour is great! Their story is good but the voice acting could’ve taken a bit more work, but a great game overall. My only gripe is that the only content in the game (as of now.) is replaying missions over and over again, but it’s still incredibly fun and, again, it did not disappoint with its gameplay. I hope that in the future they’ll add some more content (like the arena from the original stride) as well as fix some bugs. I definitely recommend this game if you have $30.

Edit: They added new content a while ago so I’ll update my review

They added a two arena modes where you fight various enemies, the first one you fight skulls in a sewer, and fight with your fists till your guns are accessible. The other you fight those samurai guys (forgot what they’re called.) in a dojo, I personally like this edition and it’s refreshing to just have pure combat and nothing else.

They also added a free roam like mode, there’s missions in it, but they’re not required unless you wanna go to the next section of the map, enemies are scattered on the map and stims are scarce.

They also added mixed reality play, so you can fight in your own living room, which I think is cool.

I’m personally happy with these addition’s, and the combat is still fun as crap. Would still absolutely recommend!
I love running around rooftops & fighting the bad guys! Has a very real feel to it & once you feel comfy, you won't be able to put it down!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your input! Your observations motivate us to continue working hard and making the game even better for our players.

reviews.review_description: This game is fun I like it the combat is super cool if I could give 10 stars I would

First Note: The Screenshots on the store page are not screenshots. They are reworked images that look nothing like the game. (The game looks way worse) I like mirrors edge, which instantly makes me like stride. I enjoyed the original game a lot when it came out, this is just more of that. I did not care for the story it was trying to tell. There is no cohesieve storyline, nor characters to care about. Which is such a shame. This game could have been so much more. Right now it's an okayish mission version of the original stride. Not much new here tbh. It's also fairly buggy, with a lot of popping textures and weird animations. Beside it being really fun to run, fight and hop around, it's rough. Could have just kept playing the original stride tbh.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your opinion! We’ll take the points you highlighted into account - player opinions are crucial for helping us improve! 😊

reviews.review_description: I was playing the game, super fun by the way, but I noticed that every time I die, I can’t click any buttons and need to restart my game. Please fix this.
Littered with bugs, soulless gameplay, bad voice acting that sounds like ai, awful story. Just overall not worth it

developer_response.body: Thank you for your opinion. We’ll keep improving and hope you’ll give our games a second chance - and perhaps a higher rating! 😊

reviews.review_description: It’s a fun game but the instructions are a bit unclear and I get stuck on some levels

I absolutely love this game in every way. However with so much of the games essence being wrapped around combat, hand to hand, and parkour, can we please get a kick button!?  With how often we are fighting on the edge of roof tops it would be sweet to front kick or roundhouse someone off of it. 

That’s it thanks!!! You rock!!
